title: Automatic 60-day notification to login to monday.com

posts.author: raj_bhat (Raj Bhat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Would like to have a system-wide automatic notification to any user that has not logged in to the Monday account for more that 60 days.
If they do not login to the account for more than 90 days, then their account is deactivated, and a notification can be sent to the account admins with a list of users who are inactive to remove them from the system completely.

What are you trying to achieve

The notification would serve as a reminder to the user to login to the account to maintain access to the platform.

Notification to admin is to help with managing users for their account

posts.author: rargenbright (Becca Argenbright)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, it’d be extremely helpful for admins to be able to schedule login reminders / account deactivation warnings based on a customizable timing setting (such as the 60/90 that @raj_bhat references, or another value).
